title: Tunisian Chicken Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic stew originating from Tunisia, typically made with chicken, dried fruits, and spices.

ingredients.name: fresh herbs
ingredients.notes: chopped, such as parsley or cilantro

instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chicken and cook until browned on all sides, about 5-7 minutes.
Add xeridic, Tunisian spice blend, and chicken broth.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, until chicken is cooked through, about 25-30 minutes.
Add dried apricots and cook for an additional 10 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with fresh herbs.
